actorTitle: Vietnam Hotel Lead Scraper with Emails
shortDescription: Scrape hotel leads from Google Maps in Vietnam and extract emails when available.
longDescription: Scrape hotel, resort, homestay, hostel, villa and apartment hotel leads from Google Maps in Vietnam, including emails when available.
targetUser: Hotel suppliers, hospitality technology companies, travel platforms, B2B sales teams, and tourism service providers.
buyerPainPoint: Finding and qualifying accommodation businesses across multiple property types requires repetitive searches and manual website checks.
differentiation: Accommodation-specific multi-search across hotel types, with optional public website email extraction and lead-quality scoring.

multiSearch.locationInputDescription: Vietnam city to search for accommodation leads.
multiSearch.typeInputDescription: Accommodation types to search in the selected city.
multiSearch.maxResultsInputDescription: Maximum number of Google Maps results to collect for each hotel type.
